newsitems.title: Type or Die joins Steam Next Fest June 2026 ⭐ — Final Demo Update!
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: Type or Die Officially Joins Steam Next Fest June 2026!Hello everyone!Type or Die will officially participate in Steam Next Fest from June 15th to June 22nd, 2026.To prepare for the event, the demo has received its final major update with numerous improvements based on player feedback.Demo Update Highlights7 cards in hand instead of 5Detailed explanations for every cardStart with 50 HP and 50 ShieldNew Goblin event that can steal one of your selected cardsAdditional music tracksMany more Power Ups after defeating BossesGeneral optimizations and improvements👉 Add the game to your wishlist to be notified when it launches and to support its development. ❤️

newsitems.title: Demo Update #3
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: Hello everyone,Some players reported performance issues and optimization problems with the demo. I’ve been working on it and just released an update focused on improving overall performance.This update should make the game run better, especially on lower-end PCs.👉 I need your help: Please let me know if the game runs better now on your side.If you can, share your PC specs (CPU, GPU, RAM) along with your feedback — it really helps me understand where improvements are still needed.Thanks a lot for playing and for your feedback, it helps a ton in making the game better 🙏

newsitems.title: Demo Update #2
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: 🔧 FixesFixed a bug related to a Select Power upgrade🆕 ImprovementsAdded more words to improve variety and gameplay

newsitems.title: Demo Update #1
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: 🔧 Changes & FixesFixed a bug in "Select Power" (the Chance option has been removed)Bosses now appear earlierFixed an issue where the mouse cursor could disappear after clickingCard texts are now bold for better readability🆕 New Content3 new cards:Mirror → You attack when the enemy attacks+1 Dice → You can accumulate more diceForgotten Treasure → Gain 5 gold, but the enemy attacks first1 new boss: The Wolf1 new level1 new enemy: The Centipede Cat💬 FeedbackThanks again for your feedback — it helps shape the game and improve the experience.More updates coming soon!

newsitems.title: Type or Die is participating in the Medieval Festival – Demo available now!
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: Type or Die is proud to participate in the Steam Medieval Festival!📅To celebrate, the demo is now available on Steam, giving you your first chance to experience the game.📥 Play the demo todayThe demo lets you explore the core mechanics, fight your first enemies, and get a taste of the full roguelite experience.❤️ Add Type or Die to your wishlist to support development and stay informed about the full release.

newsitems.title: Type or Die is participating in the Horse Festival 🐎 — Demo announced!
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: Type or Die is officially participating in the Steam Horse Festival!📅At this festival, we are also thrilled to announce that the playable demo of Type or Die will be available on April 20, 2026.The demo will allow you to :Discover typing-based combatExplore the dynamic game boardFace your first enemies and bossesTest the first cards, relics, and synergies👉 Add the game to your wishlist to be notified as soon as the demo is released and follow its development. ❤️

newsitems.title: ⚔️⌨️Type or Die is participating in the Typing Festival ⌨️⚔️
newsitems.author: Hunt Games
newsitems.contents: Type or Die is officially participating in the Steam Typing Festival!📜 The Steam page for the demo is now live.📅 The demo's release date will be revealed very soon.👉 Add Type or Die to your wishlist to support the project and never miss out.Thank you all for your incredible support ❤️
